title: The Accidental Text Message
content: Emma wanted to send a message to her best friend about a boy she liked. By mistake, she sent it directly to the boy, Ethan. She immediately felt embarrassed and thought about turning off her phone forever. A minute later, Ethan replied, “I'm really happy to know that.” Emma stared at the screen in surprise. He admitted that he had liked her for a long time but never found the courage to say it. One accidental message became the beginning of their first date.
